title: Yes,Kingdom
description: This is a build and adventure themed modpack where you can build a Minecraft kingdom and start a Minecraft war
body:
·The populace, like water, holds dual power: to uphold or overthrow governance  --Xunzi,China


# **About modpacks**
This is a fun modpack about building and adventure, which combines a number of mods for the "adventure" and "nation" styles and gameplay, allowing you to build your own Minecraft kingdom and engage in Minecraft wars with your friends as you play

However, please do not delete any of the mods, as this may result in a degraded gaming experience

The modpack comes in two versions: modern and old.The modern version is suitable for building a modern city, and the ancient version is suitable for building an ancient city

**Forge and Fabric are supported**
